corrections.correct: καὶ οὗτος ὁ ἀριθμὸς αὐτῶν· Κυρίῳ χρυσοῖ τριάκοντα
corrections.note: The phrase καὶ οὗτος ὁ is present in the image before ἀριθμὸς αὐτῶν.
Body has Βατουσι before Βαλλεία; transcript appears influenced by apparatus.
The apparatus shows A with superscript a after the variant reading.
Separator is a vertical bar, not a closing bracket, after the parenthesis.

notes: Running head and page number match. Bottom page number 163 and signature I. 2 are present and correctly transcribed. Main issues are one omitted phrase in body and one body name-list misread likely from apparatus influence.
